title: The Moon's Ledger
description: Break into the Circus way-house, take back the page with your old name on it, and get out — past the wires, the sweep, and the one they sent to wait for you.

steps.text: Reach the way-house door and deal with the sentry — quietly, if you can.
Cross the rigged corridor — spot and disarm the traps — and deal with the watchman.
Shake the sweep — control the approach with caltrops and ball bearings, then put both pursuers down.
Spot the waiting enforcer, get past the trapped ledger case, and take back the page.
